new_articles.title: Samsung posts 1,800% jump in profit, but AI spending concerns spook investors
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung posts 1,800% jump in profit, but AI spending concerns spook investors'이다. Samsung Electronics shares fell even after record preliminary second-quarter profit as capex and demand concerns clouded the outlook. Markets had been pricing in strong earnings for a while, one analyst said In this article SSUN-FF SKHY The Samsung exhibition stand features the prominent ''A new era of mobile agentic AI'' slogan by the South Korean company Samsung Electronics Shares closed nearly 7% lower Tuesday, even after it reported preliminary second-quarter operating profit of 89 4 trillion won ($58. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit'이다. Samsung Electronics has forecast a nineteen-fold leap in quarterly profit, its third record quarter in a row, yet investors responded by wiping more than $100 billion (€87. 5bn) off the company's value amid doubts over how long the AI-driven memory boom can last. The South Korean technology giant Samsung said on Tuesday it expects operating profit of about 89. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Tough crowd for Samsung as record quarterly earnings brings out the sellers'이다. Samsung Electronics shareholders proved a difficult audience to please. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design'이다. Synopsys plans to stop offering manufacturing process control software. This move allows the company to divert resources to higher-margin AI design offerings. Chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix were informed about the end-of-life decision. Affected products include automation software that monitors fabrication plant anomalies. Some chipmakers are developing their own in-house manufacturing tools. Chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix were informed about the end-of-life decision chip design giant Synopsys plans to stop offering a suite of manufacturing process control software used by global semiconductor makers, six sources briefed on the matter said, as it seeks to divert resources to higher-margin offerings such as AI design Synopsys in April and May informed more than 10 chipmakers including Samsung Electronics , SK Hynix , Kioxia Holdings Corp and Qorvo Inc about the "end of life" move that means Synopsys will not provide future new versions and will only carry out maintenance obligations, two of the sources said Samsung had established compatible alternatives and there would be "no negative impact on production," the spokesperson said when asked if production yields could ​decline SK Hynix declined to comment.

new_articles.title: 韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 '韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍'이다. 韓国のサムスン電子は先月までの3か月間の決算を発表し、本業のもうけを示す営業利益は前の年の同じ時期と比べておよそ19倍になり、3か月ごとの決算で過去最高を更新しました。 AI需要の拡大を背景に半導体事業が業績を押し上げたとみられます。 韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍 2026年7月7日 15:21 韓国 韓国のサムスン電子は先月までの3か月間の決算を発表し、本業のもうけを示す営業利益は前の年の同じ時期と比べておよそ19倍になり、3か月ごとの決算で過去最高を更新しました。 31年ぶりの熱狂がつないだもの 7月6日 10:11 知っていますか？ 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
new_articles.original_title: 韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍

new_articles.title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
new_articles.summary: Hanwha Ocean 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines'이다. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines. In this article TKA-FF TKA-FF TKMS-DE YANTAI, CHINA - OCTOBER 27 2025: Ships are seen under construction at Hanwha Ocean Shandong Co in Yantai, Shandong province, eastern China, on Monday, Oct -based subsidiaries of the South Korean company Hanwha Ocean have been put on China's sanction list to punish its role in prompting the United States to impose additional fees on Chinese shippers and shipbuilders That is expected to be a setback to Hanwha Ocean, as the contract was estimated to be up to $100 billion over three decades, according to The Korea Times South Korean President Lee Jae Myung said on his Facebook page that although the results were not as expected in this Canadian submarine project, "challenges inevitably bring both successes and disappointments. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix to bring ADR funds to South Korea by around July 15, source says
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix to bring ADR funds to South Korea by around July 15, source says'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, July 7 : SK Hynix is expected to bring U. S. dollars into the country by around July 15, converting a part of the funds it raises in its offering of American depositary receipts (ADRs) into the won, a source familiar with the matter said on Tuesday. The South Korean chipmaker launched a U. share sale.

SEOUL, July 7 : South Korean battery maker LG Energy Solution said on Tuesday it expects April-June operating profit to fall 77 per cent to 113 billion won ($73. 91 million), as sluggish electric vehicle (EV) demand continued to weigh on battery sales. Chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix were informed about the end-of-life decision chip design giant Synopsys plans to stop offering a suite of manufacturing process control software used by global semiconductor makers, six sources briefed on the matter said, as it seeks to divert resources to higher-margin offerings such as AI design Synopsys in April and May informed more than 10 chipmakers including Samsung Electronics , SK Hynix , Kioxia Holdings Corp and Qorvo Inc about the "end of life" move that means Synopsys will not provide future new versions and will only carry out maintenance obligations, two of the sources said Samsung had established compatible alternatives and there would be "no negative impact on production," the spokesperson said when asked if production yields could ​decline SK Hynix declined to comment.
